data.name: Monster Ops 14
data.detailed_description:
A NSFW Gay Visual Novel Dating Sim Put out in Monthly Episodes!

Episode 1 and Episode 13 are  Free on Steam!

Black Ops soldiers Wraith and Tide know the world is against them, and they can only rely on each other. Two soldiers, forced to go rogue, with a desperate mission. There's no one left they can trust. 

Binge the Entire Season 1! Click on any Episode from 2-6 for Bundle One, and 7-12 for Bundle Two!
The Bundles are Linked on the Tops of the Store Pages

The cliffhanger from the season premiere breathlessly continues in episode 14.  Wraith and Tide have been chased into the bowels of a water treatment plant in the swamp. 

Captain Namar and the monster soldier Harse have them trapped.  With Cyclops dead and GIla out hunting for the frog monster Gem, Namar has asked for reinforcements.

This could be the Brigadier General's only chance to capture his son Tide.  Major Hanson therefore creates her first ever Class-A monster for him.  The hideously large Jeb monster is immune to bullets and can hunt by scent.  

Heath is terrified of letting this monster go after his son.  Balasque agrees to join the mission to make sure his beloved friends are not killed.  His orders are to capture Tide alive, but he's desperate to protect the lives of both his former lovers.

Loaded with twists, multiple endings, CG art, and even animations--season two of Monster Ops is continuing with a bang!

Two soldiers, forced to go rogue, with a desperate mission. There's no one left they can trust. A NSFW Gay Visual Novel Dating Sim Put out in Monthly Episodes!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.0 Ghz
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: High Sierra 10.13 or Higher, Both Intel and Silicon
  • 處理器: 1.0 Ghz
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64+
  • 處理器: 1.0 Ghz
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
